product_overview: JJIKGO Photobooth is a multi-application system (Cashier, Staff, Admin) that centralizes POS, queue management, shift handling, and branch administration with real-time synchronization and printing integration.
core_goals: Provide a reliable Cashier POS for transaction creation, payment processing, and invoice generation
Enable floor staff to manage queues and shifts with starting/ending cash and expense tracking
Allow admins to manage branches, users, themes, pricing, and monitor activity in real time
Ensure real-time synchronization across apps per-branch using Socket.IO and decoupled print request handling

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and retrieve current user profile to secure access across Cashier, Staff, and Admin apps.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/auth/login -> Send POST /api/auth/login with email and password -> Receive 200 OK with auth token -> Navigate to /api/auth/me with token -> Receive 200 OK with current user profile
Navigate to /api/auth/login -> Send POST /api/auth/login with incorrect password -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> See error message indicating invalid credentials

features.name: Manage Branches (Admin)
features.description: Create and list branches so admins can configure physical locations and scope data by branch.
user_flows: Authenticate user (have valid token) -> Navigate to /api/branches -> Send POST /api/branches with branch name, address, and settings -> Receive 201 Created with branch id -> See new branch present in branch list
Attempt to create branch without authentication -> Navigate to /api/branches -> Send POST /api/branches without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> See error message 'Authentication required'
Authenticate user (have valid token) -> Navigate to /api/branches -> Send POST /api/branches with missing required fields -> Receive 400 Bad Request -> See validation error details

features.name: Cashier POS - Transaction Creation & Payment
features.description: Create transactions for photo sessions including theme, package, addons, snacks, apply promos, process payment, and generate unique invoice numbers.
user_flows: Open Cashier App -> Start new transaction -> Fill customer name field -> Select theme -> Select package -> Add addons and cafe snacks as needed -> Apply promo code -> Click Pay -> Select payment method and confirm payment -> Receive payment confirmation and unique invoice number -> System places transaction into appropriate Queue and triggers printRequested event
Open Cashier App -> Start new transaction -> Fill out required fields incompletely -> Click Pay -> Receive validation errors for missing required fields -> Correct fields -> Retry payment

Open Cashier App -> Start new transaction -> Complete transaction and click Pay using card -> Payment gateway returns failure -> Receive payment failed notification -> Transaction remains in draft and user sees retry option

features.name: Queue System (Staff)
features.description: Automatically place paid customers into theme-specific queues, allow staff to update statuses, and let customers track position via QR.
user_flows: Open Staff App -> Connect to branch room -> See new paid transaction appear in theme queue in real time -> Click transaction -> Click 'Mark In-Progress' -> See queue status update to in-progress
Open Staff App -> Search queue by transaction QR -> Scan/enter QR code -> Receive matching queue position and transaction details -> See estimated wait or booth assignment
Open Staff App -> Scan invalid or expired QR -> Receive 'Not Found' or 'Invalid QR' error -> Prompt customer to contact staff

features.name: Shift Handling & Expense Tracking (Staff)
features.description: Staff open and close shifts with starting/ending cash, log expenses during shift, and produce reconciliation totals.
user_flows: Open Staff App -> Navigate to Shift screen -> Click 'Open Shift' -> Enter starting_cash value -> Confirm open -> Shift status shows active
During active shift -> Record expenses by entering amount and description -> Save expense -> See expense added to current shift total -> Ending cash and expenses included in reconciliation
Attempt to process a transaction while no shift is open -> Open Cashier or Staff App -> Start transaction -> Receive error 'Shift not open' -> Prompt user to open shift before proceeding

features.name: Real-time Synchronization & Print Requests
features.description: Use Socket.IO branch-scoped rooms for instant updates and emit printRequested events to a decoupled print handler for physical booth printing.
user_flows: Start Staff or Cashier App -> Establish Socket.IO connection and join branch room -> Connection reports 'joined branch' -> Remain subscribed to events for that branch

Cashier completes payment -> Backend emits 'newTransaction' event to branch room -> Staff and Admin apps receive 'newTransaction' in real time -> Staff sees new transaction appear in queue immediately

Cashier completes payment and backend emits 'printRequested' for that transaction -> Print service subscribed to branch room receives 'printRequested' -> Print service sends job to local printer -> Receive print success acknowledgement

Socket connection drops on Staff app -> App shows 'connection lost' indicator -> Attempt automatic reconnect -> If reconnect fails, app displays 'real-time sync unavailable' and queues local actions for retry
